name: Ranger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Mrs. Heaton
Cream the shortening, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Sift together the flour, baking powder, soda, and salt.
Mix in the vanilla, coconut, Wheaties, and quick-cooking oats.
Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes at 375°F.
